_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice developed MM at a greatly accelerated rate (median, 24 weeks) compared to Nf2+/− (38 weeks) and WT (45 weeks) mice
details: Developed mesothelioma with median time of 38 weeks when chronically injected with asbestos i.p. over 24-week period
